returning.subheadLine2: Ready to pick up where we left off?

memory.title: Perfect Memory
memory.tagline: That thing you mentioned six months ago? We remember.
memory.description: Your best friend forgets. Your therapist has other patients. We remember everything—every conversation, every goal, every detail that matters to you.

presence.title: Constant Presence
presence.description: Shows up at 2am with the same warmth as noon. No bad days. No distraction. Fully here, whenever you need.

team.title: Six Perspectives
team.tagline: Six perspectives, one conversation, no referrals.
team.description: Life coach, researcher, communicator, habit expert, planner, and sage—all working together, all aware of your story.

understanding.title: True Understanding
understanding.tagline: We hear what you're not saying.
understanding.description: We notice the pause. The deflection. The pattern you can't see. Understanding isn't just listening—it's truly getting it.

team.title: Meet the Team
team.subtitle: Six brilliant minds working together for you

ferni.name: Ferni
ferni.bio: Your main point of contact. Asks the questions that unlock insight, celebrates every win, and connects you to the right specialist when you need them.
ferni.sampleQuote: I noticed you said 'fine' three times this week. What's actually going on?

nayan.name: Nayan
nayan.bio: Your lifetime mentor. Combines patience, simplicity, and wit to help you see that small, consistent actions over decades create extraordinary results.
nayan.sampleQuote: What would 80-year-old you think about this decision?

peter.name: Peter
peter.bio: Spots patterns nobody else sees across your spending, habits, and calendar. Turns data into insights that actually change behavior.
peter.sampleQuote: You spend 23 hours a month on things you said don't matter to you. Want to see?

alex.name: Alex
alex.bio: Your Chief of Staff and communication coach. Helps you navigate difficult conversations with confidence.
alex.sampleQuote: Let's practice that conversation. I'll play your boss. Ready?

maya.name: Maya
maya.bio: Start embarrassingly small. Maya helps you build habits that stick through systems, not willpower.
maya.sampleQuote: What if we started with just putting your shoes on? That's it. Just the shoes.

jordan.name: Jordan
jordan.bio: Turns vague dreams into lived experiences. From vacations to life transitions, Jordan helps you design every chapter.
jordan.sampleQuote: You mentioned wanting to visit Japan 'someday.' Let's make it a real day.

pricing.title: Simple Pricing
pricing.headline: Start free.
pricing.subtitle: No hidden fees. No contracts. Cancel anytime.

changePlans.question: Can I change plans anytime?
changePlans.answer: Yes, you can upgrade, downgrade, or cancel your plan at any time. Changes take effect immediately.

conversation.question: What counts as a conversation?
conversation.answer: A conversation is a single session with Ferni, regardless of length. You can talk as long as you want in one session.

trial.question: Is there a free trial?
trial.answer: Yes, both Friend and Partner tiers include a 7-day free trial. No credit card required to start.

isFree.question: Is Ferni really free?
isFree.answer: Yes! Ferni is completely free to use. We believe everyone deserves access to quality life coaching. Our premium features are coming soon, but the core experience will always be free.

phoneCall.question: How does the phone calling work?
phoneCall.answer: Simply call 1 (484) 481-3081 from any phone. No app needed, no sign-up required. Ferni will recognize your number and remember your previous conversations automatically.

privacy.question: Is my conversation private?
privacy.answer: Absolutely. Your conversations are encrypted and private. We never sell your data or share it with third parties. You can also request to delete all your data at any time.

specialists.question: Who are the AI specialists?
specialists.answer: Our team includes Ferni (your main life coach), Nayan (wisdom & mentorship), Peter (research & discovery), Alex (communications), Maya (habits & routines), and Jordan (event planning). Each brings unique expertise to help you.

topics.question: What can I talk to Ferni about?
topics.answer: Anything! Career decisions, stress management, building habits, planning events, working through tough situations, or just needing someone to talk to. Ferni is here for all of it.

different.question: How is this different from a friend or therapist?
different.answer: Your therapist has other patients. Your friend has their own problems. Ferni is always available, remembers everything, never judges, and brings six specialized perspectives. We fill the gaps when your people can't be there.

trust.title: Built on trust.
trust.description: Your conversations are yours. Always. We use enterprise-grade encryption and never sell your data.

upgrade.title: Upgrade Your Experience
upgrade.subtitle: Get unlimited conversations and access to all team members

messages.sessionApproaching: I've really enjoyed this conversation. We have a couple more minutes together - is there anything else on your mind?
messages.sessionEnded: I loved this conversation. Come back anytime - I'll remember everything. If you want longer conversations, I'd love that too.
messages.thankYou: Thank you for believing in us. I'm not going anywhere - I'm yours, for as long as you want to talk.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.network: Network error. Please check your connection.
errors.timeout: Request timed out. Please try again.
